name: sift
title: Sift - Obsidian Tasks
description: Surface and manage tasks from your Obsidian vault
author: dru89

commands.name: summary
commands.title: Task Summary
commands.subtitle: Sift
commands.description: Quick overview of your Obsidian tasks

commands.name: list-tasks
commands.title: List Tasks
commands.subtitle: Sift
commands.description: Browse and search all open tasks

commands.name: add-task
commands.title: Add Task
commands.subtitle: Sift
commands.description: Add a new task to today's daily note

commands.name: next-tasks
commands.title: Up Next
commands.subtitle: Sift
commands.description: See your most important tasks right now

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Vault Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault

preferences.name: dailyNotesPath
preferences.title: Daily Notes Folder
preferences.description: Folder for daily notes, relative to vault root

preferences.name: excludeFolders
preferences.title: Excluded Folders
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of folders to skip when scanning
